member.name: T:NavbharatAgroAPI.Controllers.EmployeeController
member.summary: Manages Employee records in the Navbharat Agro system.

member.name: M:NavbharatAgroAPI.Controllers.EmployeeController.GetEmployees
member.summary: Retrieves a list of all employees.

member.name: M:NavbharatAgroAPI.Controllers.EmployeeController.GetEmployee(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a specific employee by their unique ID.
member.param: The unique identifier of the employee.

member.name: M:NavbharatAgroAPI.Controllers.EmployeeController.PostEmployee(NavbharatAgroAPI.DTOs.EmployeeRequestDto)
member.summary: Creates a new employee record.
member.param: The details of the new employee.

member.name: M:NavbharatAgroAPI.Controllers.EmployeeController.PutEmployee(System.Int32,NavbharatAgroAPI.DTOs.EmployeeRequestDto)
member.summary: Updates an existing employee's details.
member.param: The unique identifier of the employee to update.

member.name: M:NavbharatAgroAPI.Controllers.EmployeeController.DeleteEmployee(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes an employee from the system.
member.param: The unique identifier of the employee to delete.

member.name: T:NavbharatAgroAPI.Controllers.FieldVisitController
member.summary: Manages Field Visit records, including GPS location tracking.

member.name: M:NavbharatAgroAPI.Controllers.FieldVisitController.GetFieldVisits
member.summary: Retrieves a list of all field visits.

member.name: M:NavbharatAgroAPI.Controllers.FieldVisitController.GetFieldVisit(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a specific field visit by its ID.
member.param: The unique identifier of the field visit.

member.name: M:NavbharatAgroAPI.Controllers.FieldVisitController.PostFieldVisit(NavbharatAgroAPI.DTOs.FieldVisitRequestDto)
member.summary: Creates a new field visit record.
member.param: The field visit details including optional GPS coordinates.

member.name: M:NavbharatAgroAPI.Controllers.FieldVisitController.PutFieldVisit(System.Int32,NavbharatAgroAPI.DTOs.FieldVisitRequestDto)
member.summary: Updates an existing field visit.
member.param: The unique identifier of the field visit.

member.name: M:NavbharatAgroAPI.Controllers.FieldVisitController.DeleteFieldVisit(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a field visit record.
member.param: The unique identifier of the field visit to delete.

member.name: M:NavbharatAgroAPI.Controllers.FieldVisitController.MapToResponseDto(NavbharatAgroAPI.Models.FieldVisit,System.String)
member.summary: Helper to consistently map a FieldVisit entity to FieldVisitResponseDto.

member.name: T:NavbharatAgroAPI.Controllers.OrderBookingController
member.summary: Manages Order Bookings and their associated Products.

member.name: M:NavbharatAgroAPI.Controllers.OrderBookingController.GetOrderBookings
member.summary: Retrieves a list of all order bookings, including their products.

member.name: M:NavbharatAgroAPI.Controllers.OrderBookingController.GetPendingOrderBookings
member.summary: Retrieves a list of pending order bookings, including their products.

member.name: M:NavbharatAgroAPI.Controllers.OrderBookingController.GetDeliveredOrderBookings
member.summary: Retrieves a list of delivered order bookings, including their products.

member.name: M:NavbharatAgroAPI.Controllers.OrderBookingController.GetOrderBookingsByEmployee(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a list of all order bookings for a specific employee.
member.param: The unique identifier of the employee.

member.name: M:NavbharatAgroAPI.Controllers.OrderBookingController.GetPendingOrderBookingsByEmployee(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a list of pending order bookings for a specific employee.
member.param: The unique identifier of the employee.

member.name: M:NavbharatAgroAPI.Controllers.OrderBookingController.GetDeliveredOrderBookingsByEmployee(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a list of delivered order bookings for a specific employee.
member.param: The unique identifier of the employee.

member.name: M:NavbharatAgroAPI.Controllers.OrderBookingController.GetOrderBooking(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a specific order booking by its ID, including its products.
member.param: The unique identifier of the order booking.

member.name: M:NavbharatAgroAPI.Controllers.OrderBookingController.PostOrderBooking(NavbharatAgroAPI.DTOs.OrderBookingRequestDto)
member.summary: Creates a new order booking along with its products.

member.name: M:NavbharatAgroAPI.Controllers.OrderBookingController.PutOrderBooking(System.Int32,NavbharatAgroAPI.DTOs.OrderBookingRequestDto)
member.summary: Updates an existing order booking and syncs its products.
member.param: The unique identifier of the order booking.

member.name: M:NavbharatAgroAPI.Controllers.OrderBookingController.DeleteOrderBooking(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes an order booking and cascades to delete all associated products.
member.param: The unique identifier of the order booking to delete.

member.name: M:NavbharatAgroAPI.Controllers.OrderBookingController.DeliverOrderBooking(System.Int32)
member.summary: Marks an order booking as Delivered.
member.param: The unique identifier of the order booking.

member.name: M:NavbharatAgroAPI.Controllers.OrderBookingController.MapToResponseDto(NavbharatAgroAPI.Models.OrderBooking,System.String)
member.summary: Helper to consistently map an OrderBooking entity to OrderBookingResponseDto.

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.
